design_philosophy.vibe: A digital command center for citizens. Serious, clean, high-contrast, verified.
design_philosophy.accessibility_focus: High contrast text, clear touch targets, age-inclusive (18-60+)

rules: Headings MUST use Manrope. It conveys modern authority and supports Cyrillic perfectly.
Data points (points, dates, coordinates) MUST use JetBrains Mono.
Body text uses Inter for maximum legibility across all ages.
Use 'tracking-tight' on all headings larger than 24px.

usage_rules: Backgrounds are deep slate/black (#0a0a0a), NOT gray.
Cards use glassmorphism: bg-background/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10.
Status indicators (Red/Green) must be vibrant neon in dark mode.
NEVER use gradients for text. Keep it legible.
Primary Action Button: White text on Blue (#3b82f6) or Red (#ef4444) depending on context (Verify vs Report).

cards.classes: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-border/50 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-lg font-medium px-6 py-3 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-lg

inputs.style: Flat with bottom border focus or filled subtle
inputs.classes: bg-secondary/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 rounded-lg h-12

maps.style_dark: .leaflet-layer { filter: invert(100%) hue-rotate(180deg) brightness(95%) contrast(90%); } .leaflet-container { background: #000; }
maps.markers: Custom HTML markers using div icons with pulsing CSS animations.

layout_strategies.feed: Masonry or Single Column Stream with large images
layout_strategies.map_view: Full screen map with floating overlay cards
layout_strategies.spacing: Generous padding (py-12) to separate content sections.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use heavily for overlays on maps and images.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle radial gradients in background to spotlight active areas (e.g. behind the 'Create Review' button).
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px borders with 10% opacity white (dark mode) or 10% black (light mode).
visual_enhancers.shadows: Colored shadows for buttons (e.g. blue button glows blue).

instructions_to_main_agent: SETUP: Add Manrope font from Google Fonts (import in index.css).
SETUP: Configure Tailwind colors to match the palette.
MAP: Implement the dark mode CSS filter for Leaflet tiles in index.css.
LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the Home Dashboard.
INTERACTION: Use framer-motion for smooth page transitions and list entrance animations.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text scaling works (use rem units).
LANGUAGE: All text MUST be in Russian.
COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components to remove the default radius if it conflicts with the 'Tactical' look (prefer rounded-lg or rounded-md).
THEME: Default to DARK mode but allow toggle.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.avoid_slop: Do not use generic gray borders. Use colored low-opacity borders.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.animations: Add hover states to EVERYTHING interactive. Use scale-105 or color shifts.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Don't crowd the text.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.z_index: Ensure map controls (z-[1000]) are always above the map tiles but below modals.
